overview.title: Overview
overview.placeholder: Stats and shortcuts will go here.

redeemCodes.title: Redeem codes
redeemCodes.subtitle: Generate 20-character codes, filter by points and status, export as txt.
redeemCodes.placeholder: Coming soon: issue and revoke codes.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Search by full email, view image generation quota and consumed amounts, then edit credits in the database.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Create or delete site-wide notices. Users only see items that are published and within the active window (popup picks the latest).
announcements.placeholder: Coming soon: publish and schedule posts.

presets.title: Inspiration library
presets.subtitle: Manage the presets table: platform rows, public or private user presets. Create or edit (preset tree or custom categories), visibility, cover, prompts, or delete rows.

redeemCodes.generateDesc: Each code is 20 characters (same alphabet as user redemption). Max 500 per request.
redeemCodes.listDesc: Apply filters, then export: one code per line in the txt file.
redeemCodes.toastGenIncomplete: Could not finish (too many collisions). Try fewer codes.

announcementsPanel.formDesc: Body supports Markdown or HTML (trusted admin). Deleting an announcement also removes user read records.
announcementsPanel.bodyHint: Same rendering as the in-app popup and history list.
announcementsPanel.published: Publish now (off = draft, hidden from users)
announcementsPanel.deleteDesc: This removes read records and cannot be undone.

errors.invalid_range: End time must be after start time

usersPanel.searchDesc: Use the full signup email (case-insensitive). Large projects may scan multiple pages—please wait.
usersPanel.editDesc: Writes to ai_image_credits. Creates a row if the user had none.

presetsPanel.createCardDesc: Inserts into presets: title, categories (preset tree or custom primary/secondary), cover, negative prompt, visibility (platform rows are always public), and params aligned with the generator (model, prompt, n, size, resolution, image_urls).
presetsPanel.createHintPlatform: Platform rows must be public in the database.
presetsPanel.filtersDesc: Filter by visibility, title, or primary category. Platform rows have no user_id and must stay public.
presetsPanel.listDesc: Service-role access. Deletes cannot be undone; forks referencing this row get source_preset_id cleared (ON DELETE SET NULL).
presetsPanel.sheetDesc: Use the built-in category tree or enter custom labels. Platform presets cannot be made private.
presetsPanel.hintPlatformPublic: Platform rows must remain public (database rule).
presetsPanel.deleteDesc: This cannot be undone. Forks that referenced it will lose the source link.
presetsPanel.errCategories: Primary and secondary categories cannot be empty
presetsPanel.errCategoryTooLong: Category text is too long (max 80 characters each)
presetsPanel.categoryCustomHint: Custom labels are stored as-is. If the public inspiration filters rely on the fixed tree, update the frontend list when you add new labels.

announcement.saveReadError: Could not save acknowledgement. Try again.
announcement.historySubtitle: Published announcements that have started (including ended). Expand a row to read the full text.

helpFeedback.label: Your message
helpFeedback.placeholder: Bug reports, feature ideas, unclear UI copy…
helpFeedback.errorTooLong: Message is too long. Shorten it and try again.
helpFeedback.errorGeneric: Could not submit. Try again later.

loginForm.name: Login
loginForm.title1: Enter your email below to login to your account
loginForm.emailMessage: Please enter a valid email address!
loginForm.passwordMessage: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
loginForm.emailNotConfirmed: This email is not verified yet. Open the message we sent when you signed up and click the confirmation link, then try logging in again. Check spam if you don't see it.

signUpForm.name: Sign Up
signUpForm.title1: Enter your inforation below to create an account
signUpForm.fullNameMessage: Your name must be at least 3 characters long.
signUpForm.emailMessage: Please enter a valid email address!
signUpForm.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
signUpForm.infoVerifyEmailTitle: Check your email to verify your account
signUpForm.infoVerifyEmailDesc: We sent a confirmation link to your inbox. Click the link in that email before signing in; you cannot log in until the address is verified.
signUpForm.btn2: Already have an account? Log up
signUpForm.btn3: By clicing sign up ,you aggree to our

resetPassword.title1: Enter your email below to rest your password
resetPassword.emailMessage: Please enter a valid email address!
resetPassword.passwordMessage: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.infoSuccess: Password reset email sent! Please check your email for instructions
resetPassword.infoError: There is an error sending the password reset email

faqs.name: FAQs
faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.text: Here are some of the most frequently asked questions about our product.

features.name: features
features.title: Unlock Unlimited Possibilities with AI Image
features.text: Our platform offers a wide range of features designed to enhance your image creation experience. From easy-to-use editing tools to powerful AI-powered image generation, we have everything you need to bring your ideas to life.

hero.title2: Transform your photos with the power of AI
hero.title3: From headshots to influencer photos, AI Image 's state-of-the-art technology ensures you always look your best. Create, edit, and generate images effortlessly.

price.name: price
price.title1: Choose the plan that fits your needs
price.title2: Choose an offordable plan that is packed with the best features for engaging your audience,createing customer loyalty and driving sales. engaging your
price.emptyPlans: Pricing is not configured yet. Please check back later or sign in from the dashboard.

footer.title1: Image AI Inc. All rights reserved.

review.title3: Discover why thousands are choosing AI Image for effortless,high-quality photo generation, from LinkedIn headshots to vibrant social media content.

ready.title2: Join thousands of users who are already creating amazing AI-generated images.

redeemPage.title: Redeem code
redeemPage.desc: Enter a valid code to add image generation credits to your account.

modelTraining.title: Preset library
modelTraining.desc:
Save your usual style and generation settings to reuse on your next creation.
After you add reference images, the AI can continue in the same visual style.
Add image links or upload from your device—up to 16 reference images.

presetsStudio.noUserPresets: Nothing saved yet. Fill in the form on the right and save.
presetsStudio.refLimitExceeded: More than 16 reference URLs (lines + uploads). Remove some before saving.

account.title: Account settings
account.desc: Manage your account settings and preferences.

accountForm.name: Profile
accountForm.emailDesc: Your email address is used for sign in add communication.

changePassword.name: Change Password
changePassword.desc: Enter your new password below to change/update your password.
changePassword.confirmPasswordDesc: Re-enter your new password to confirm.
changePassword.info: Make sure to remember your new password or store it securely.
changePassword.passwordMessage: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

securitySetting.name: Security
securitySetting.desc: Change your password to keep your account secure
securitySetting.infoSuccess: Password reset email sent! Please check your email for instructions
securitySetting.infoError: There is an error sending the password reset email

billing.title: Plans & Billing
billing.desc: Manage your subscription and billing information.

redeem.title: Enter a code to get credits
redeem.description: Enter your redeem code below to add image-generation credits to your account. Codes are 12–20 characters (A–Z and 2–9, excluding 0, O, 1, I, L).
redeem.label: Code
redeem.success: Redeemed successfully. {points} image generation credits added.
redeem.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
redeem.already_used: This code has already been used.
redeem.unknown: Redeem failed. Please try again later.

planSummarry.noInfo4: Please upgrade to a plan to continue using the app.

gallery.title: My Images
gallery.desc: Here you can see all the images you have generated .Click on an image to view details

model.title: My Models
model.desc: View and manage your trained models

inspiration.title: Inspiration
inspiration.desc: Filter by category or search title / prompt, then save to your preset library.
inspiration.emptyFiltered: No matches for these filters. Try different keywords.

settings.name: Scenario presets
settings.presetPickerInfo: Pick a bundle you saved in Preset library; the form fills with those settings and you can edit before generating.
settings.fieldRefImagesHint: Paste image URLs, one per line, or upload images below.
settings.refLimitToast: At most 16 reference images (lines plus uploads)
